hero.title: Absolute Control, Technology and Trust in Your Property Cleaning.
hero.subtitle: Manage multiple contracts, validate teams via GPS, and inspect results with visual proof in real time. A modern platform that combines technology efficiency with the rigor, integrity, and operational excellence of military leadership.

segments.label: Segments served
segments.title: Operational Efficiency and Rigor for Any Scenario.
segments.subtitle: Whether maintaining your company's corporate image or guaranteeing top ratings for your guests, our platform adapts perfectly to your industry's requirements.

commercial.title: Commercial Cleaning
commercial.description: We keep offices, clinics, and commercial establishments impeccable—ensuring a productive, sanitized environment that conveys total professionalism to your clients.

airbnb.title: Airbnb & Vacation Rentals
airbnb.description: The hospitality standard your short-term rental business needs. Mandatory before-and-after photos and validated check-in ensure the property is perfect before the next guest arrives.

residential.title: Residential Cleaning
residential.description: Care, discretion, and the highest standards of trust for the maintenance and well-being of your home.

postConstruction.title: Post-Construction Cleaning
postConstruction.description: Technical and detailed removal of dust, paint residue, and construction debris. We leave the property completely ready to move in or inaugurate.

howItWorks.label: Technology pillars
howItWorks.title: The Technology that Guarantees Perfect Delivery.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Mandatory before-and-after photo reports attached directly to your dashboard. Inspect every detail without needing to visit the site.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Legal and operational security. The provider can only start the service within the property's actual perimeter, ensuring contracted time is fulfilled precisely.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Access histories, manage properties across different niches (an office and an Airbnb, for example), view invoices, and track schedules on a single screen.

languages.label: Languages
languages.title: Your Operation Without Barriers:
languages.subtitle: Lack of communication destroys operational efficiency. Our platform eliminates this problem by translating workflows instantly. While field teams execute tasks following instructions in their native language (English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, or German), your central management and reports remain perfectly aligned to your preferred language.

cta.title: Ready to elevate the management and cleaning standard of your business?
cta.subtitle: Have the predictability, technology, and integrity of an operation structured by those who understand discipline, processes, and commitment.

footer.tagline: EB Services and Solutions — technology, rigor, and trust in professional cleaning.
